info.title: ClaudePro Directory API
info.description: API documentation for ClaudePro Directory - A community-driven directory of Claude configurations

tags.name: content
tags.description: Content-related endpoints for browsing and exporting Claude configurations

tags.name: search
tags.description: Search and discovery endpoints for finding Claude configurations

tags.name: bookmarks
tags.description: User bookmark management endpoints for saving favorite configurations

tags.name: company
tags.description: Company profile endpoints for viewing company information

tags.name: profiles
tags.description: Profile-related endpoints for user and company profiles

tags.name: feeds
tags.description: RSS and Atom feed endpoints for content syndication

tags.name: templates
tags.description: Content template endpoints for wizard and form generation

tags.name: trending
tags.description: Trending, popular, and recent content endpoints

tags.name: health
tags.description: Health check and monitoring endpoints for API status

tags.name: changelog
tags.description: Changelog endpoints for viewing and syncing release notes

tags.name: sitemap
tags.description: Sitemap generation endpoints for SEO

tags.name: stats
tags.description: Statistics and analytics endpoints

tags.name: flux
tags.description: Flux integration endpoints for external services

tags.name: inngest
tags.description: Inngest webhook endpoints for background job processing

tags.name: og
tags.description: Open Graph image generation endpoints for social media previews

tags.name: openapi
tags.description: OpenAPI specification endpoint for API documentation

get.summary: Get sitemap in XML or JSON format
get.description: Generates XML or JSON sitemaps for search engines. Supports both XML (default) and JSON formats.

'Content-Type'.description: Content type (application/xml for xml, application/json for json)

example.message: Invalid format. Valid formats: xml, json
An unexpected error occurred while generating the sitemap

post.description: Submits site URLs to IndexNow for search engine indexing. Requires authentication via x-indexnow-trigger-key header.

example.message: IndexNow submission enqueued
Invalid trigger key
An unexpected error occurred while submitting to IndexNow

503.description: Service unavailable - IndexNow keys not configured

example.message: IndexNow trigger key not configured

get.summary: Get trending, popular, or recent content
get.description: Returns trending, popular, or recent content based on tab selection. Supports both page and sidebar modes with category filtering.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Content category filter (use "all" or omit for all categories)

parameters.description: Content category filter (use "all" or omit for all categories)

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

example.message: Invalid tab. Valid tabs: trending, popular, recent
An unexpected error occurred while fetching trending content

get.summary: Unified search across content, jobs, companies, and users
get.description: Provides comprehensive search with filtering, sorting, pagination, and job-specific filters. Supports content, jobs, companies, and users in a single unified search.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Number of results to skip (pagination offset)

parameters.description: Number of results to skip (pagination offset)

parameters.name: categories

schema.description: Comma-separated list of content categories to filter by

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of content categories to filter by

parameters.name: tags

schema.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

parameters.name: authors

schema.description: Comma-separated list of author slugs to filter by

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of author slugs to filter by

parameters.name: entities

schema.description: Entity types to include in search

parameters.description: Entity types to include in search

results.title: AI Agent Framework
results.description: A comprehensive framework for building AI agents

tags.description: Filtered tags

example.message: Invalid categories. Valid values: agents, mcp, rules, commands, hooks, statuslines, skills, collections, guides, jobs, changelog
An unexpected error occurred while processing the search request

get.description: Fetches content templates by category for client-side consumption. Used by the wizard to load templates dynamically.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Content category filter (use "all" or omit for all categories)

parameters.description: Content category filter (use "all" or omit for all categories)

example.message: Category parameter is required and cannot be "all". Valid categories: agents, mcp, rules, commands, hooks, statuslines, skills, collections, guides, jobs, changelog
An unexpected error occurred while fetching templates

post.description: Trigger on-demand ISR revalidation and cache tag invalidation for specified targets. Called by edge function via Supabase Realtime (logical replication).

requestBody.description: Revalidation request with secret token, optional category/slug for path revalidation, and optional tags for cache invalidation

tags.description: Cache tags to invalidate
Invalidated cache tags

400.description: Invalid request payload or missing category/tags

example.message: Missing category or tags in webhook payload
Missing secret parameter
An unexpected error occurred during revalidation

get.description: Handles GET requests from Inngest for function introspection. Delegates to Inngest runtime.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while processing Inngest request

post.description: Handles POST requests from Inngest to invoke functions. Delegates to Inngest runtime.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while executing Inngest function

put.description: Handles PUT requests from Inngest for function synchronization. Delegates to Inngest runtime.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while syncing Inngest functions

get.description: Generates RSS or Atom feeds for content or changelog entries. Supports category filtering and changelog-specific feeds.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Content category filter (use "changelog" for changelog feeds, omit or "all" for all content)

parameters.description: Content category filter (use "changelog" for changelog feeds, omit or "all" for all content)

200.description: Feed generated successfully (RSS or Atom XML)

application/json.example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><rss version="2.0"><channel><title>Claude Pro Directory</title><link>https://claudepro.directory</link><description>Community-driven directory of Claude configurations</description><item><title>Example Content</title><link>https://claudepro.directory/skills/example</link><description>Example content description</description></item></channel></rss>

schema.description: RSS or Atom feed XML content

example.message: Invalid feed type. Valid types: rss, atom
An unexpected error occurred while generating the feed

get.description: Returns the current health status of the API and database connections. Used for monitoring, uptime checks, and health dashboards.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while checking API status

get.description: Returns company profile data by slug identifier. Used to display company information on company profile pages.

example.message: Slug parameter is required and must be a valid slug format
No company found with slug "invalid-slug"
An unexpected error occurred while fetching company profile

get.description: Serves the generated OpenAPI specification JSON file. Used by API documentation tools like Scalar API Reference.

404.description: OpenAPI specification not found. Run: pnpm generate:openapi

example.message: OpenAPI specification not found. Run: pnpm generate:openapi
An unexpected error occurred while loading the OpenAPI specification

get.description: Returns available search facets (categories, tags, authors) for filtering search results. Used by the search interface to populate filter dropdowns and facet counts.

content_count.description: Number of content items in this category

tags.description: Available tags

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while fetching search facets

get.description: Returns search autocomplete suggestions based on a query string. Used by the search interface to provide real-time search suggestions as users type.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-20)

parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-20)

search_count.description: Number of searches for this suggestion

400.description: Invalid query parameters (query must be at least 2 characters)

example.message: Query must be at least 2 characters
An unexpected error occurred while fetching autocomplete suggestions

post.description: Receives browser logs from Pino transmit and forwards them to Axiom with server-side context. Used internally by Pino browser transmit.

get.description: Routes GET requests to appropriate Flux handlers based on path segments (e.g., /api/flux/email/count). Supports dynamic routing for internal services.

example.message: No Flux handler found for path: invalid/path
An unexpected error occurred while routing Flux request

post.description: Routes POST requests to appropriate Flux handlers based on path segments (e.g., /api/flux/discord/direct). Supports dynamic routing for internal services.

example.message: Discord notification sent
No Flux handler found for path: invalid/path
An unexpected error occurred while routing Flux request

get.summary: Get sitewide content in various formats
get.description: Serves sitewide content in multiple export formats: LLMs text format (default), README JSON data, or complete JSON array. Used for exporting the entire directory content.

200.description: Sitewide content retrieved successfully in requested format

'Content-Type'.description: Content type (text/plain for llms formats, application/json for json/readme)

application/json.example:
# Sitewide Content

## Skills
- Example Skill 1
- Example Skill 2

## Agents
- Example Agent 1

example.message: Invalid format. Valid formats: llms, llms-txt, readme, json
An unexpected error occurred while generating sitewide content

get.description: Returns paginated content with optional category filtering. Supports offset/limit pagination and category filtering.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Number of results to skip (pagination offset)

parameters.description: Number of results to skip (pagination offset)

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Content category filter (use "all" or omit for all categories)

parameters.description: Content category filter (use "all" or omit for all categories)

example.message: Limit must be between 1 and 100
An unexpected error occurred while fetching paginated content

get.description: Returns category configuration data including features, metadata, and display settings. Used by the frontend to render category-specific UI and determine available features.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while fetching category configurations

get.description: Returns the changelog in LLMs.txt format for AI/LLM consumption. Used for exporting changelog data in a standardized text format.

application/json.example:
# Changelog

## [1.0.0] - 2025-01-11
- Added new feature
- Fixed bug

## [0.9.0] - 2025-01-10
- Initial release

example.message: Invalid format. Valid format: llms-changelog
An unexpected error occurred while generating changelog

post.description: Syncs changelog entry from CHANGELOG.md to database and enqueues notification. Called by GitHub Actions after generating changelog and creating tag. Requires Bearer token authentication.

requestBody.description: Changelog entry data including version, date, content, and optional metadata (tldr, whatChanged, sections, rawContent)

example.message: Changelog entry synced successfully
Content is required

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Bearer token

example.message: Invalid or missing Bearer token
An unexpected error occurred while syncing changelog entry

get.description: Returns category content in multiple formats (LLMs.txt or JSON). Supports filtering by content category with optimized caching.

'Content-Type'.description: Content type (text/plain for llms-category, application/json for json)

example.message: No content found for the specified category
An unexpected error occurred while fetching category content

post.description: Removes a bookmark for the authenticated user. Requires authentication.

requestBody.description: Bookmark details including content slug and content type

example.message: content_slug is required and must be a string
Authentication required. Please provide a valid JWT token.
An unexpected error occurred while removing the bookmark

post.description: Adds a bookmark for the authenticated user. Requires authentication.

requestBody.description: Bookmark details including content slug, content type, and optional notes

example.message: content_slug is required and must be a string
Authentication required. Please provide a valid JWT token.
An unexpected error occurred while adding the bookmark

get.summary: Get changelog entry in LLMs.txt format
get.description: Returns a changelog entry as an LLMs-compliant plain-text file for the given slug. Validates the format query parameter (must be 'llms-entry').

200.description: Changelog entry LLMs.txt content retrieved successfully

application/json.example:
# Changelog Entry

## [1.2.0] - 2025-12-07

### Added
- New feature X
- New feature Y

### Fixed
- Bug fix A
- Bug fix B

example.message: Invalid format. Valid format: llms-entry
No changelog entry found with slug "invalid-slug"
An unexpected error occurred while generating changelog entry

get.summary: Get content detail in multiple formats
get.description: Returns individual content records in multiple formats (JSON, Markdown, LLMs.txt, Storage). Supports various export options including metadata and footer inclusion.

parameters.name: includeMetadata

schema.description: Include metadata in markdown export (default: true)

parameters.description: Include metadata in markdown export (default: true)

parameters.name: includeFooter

schema.description: Include footer in markdown export (default: false)

parameters.description: Include footer in markdown export (default: false)

parameters.name: metadata

schema.description: Return metadata only for storage format (default: false)

parameters.description: Return metadata only for storage format (default: false)

'Content-Type'.description: Content type (application/json for json, text/markdown for markdown, text/plain for llms, application/json for storage)

example.title: Code Reviewer Agent
example.description: An AI agent that reviews code for quality and best practices

400.description: Invalid category, format, or query parameters

example.message: No content found with slug "invalid-slug" in category "agents"
An unexpected error occurred while fetching content detail
